diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase, provides default router initialization, and instantiates SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as fallbacks.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions, methods like constructor.
+- Simple note: Entry point of Hono with router configuration.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono providing routing methods (get, post, put, delete, etc), middleware support (use, mount), error handling (onError, notFound), and the #dispatch method for request handling.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, get, post, put, delete, options, all, on, use, H, HonoOptions types, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, Env, Schema, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, private variables #path and #notFoundHandler.
+- Simple note: Core Hono implementation with router abstraction and request handling.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export wrapper for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin export for module system.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PatternRouter class implementing path pattern matching using compiled regular expressions, handles method matching and dynamic parameter extraction with various pattern types including wildcards and named parameters with regex constraints.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route type, PatternRouter class, add and match methods, ROUTES type, Route type, emptyParams constant, RegExp, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, route matching logic with regex compilation.
+- Simple note: Router using compiled regex patterns for fast matching.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export wrapper for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin export for module system.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: LinearRouter class implementing linear route matching with star wildcards, handles method matching, supports star wildcards (*), labeled parameters (:name), and optional parameters (?), linearly iterates through routes to find matches.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, emptyParams constant, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, star wildcard matching, label matching with regex, optional parameter matching, star with label throws error.
+- Simple note: Sequential route matching with star and labeled parameter support.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export wrapper for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Main export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter class that builds regular expression matchers from route paths, using Trie structure internally for organization, supports middleware, handles wildcard patterns (*), builds compiled Regex matcher for efficient matching, uses PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match function, PARAMAssocArray, PathError (Symbol), Trie, ParamIndexMap, HandlerWithMetadata, wildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, buildAllMatchers.
+- Simple note: Fast regex-based router with internal Trie organization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Provides Matcher interface and match function for RegExpRouter, handles static matching against path and regex fallback, returns handler data and parameter index mapping.
+- Names noticed: Matcher type, MatcherMap type, ParamIndexMap type, Result type, Router type, HandlerData type, StaticMap type, emptyParam, match function, METHOD_NAME_ALL, ParamStash.
+- Simple note: Interface defining matcher structure and matching logic.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter class that pre-builds all matchers and supports serialization for deployment optimization, stores compiled matchers and relocate map for quick runtime matching, supports adding new paths dynamically.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, Matcher, StaticMap, buildInitParams function, serializeInitParams function, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData type.
+- Simple note: Optimized router for production with pre-built matchers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class implementing Trie structure for regex router, creates tree nodes for path segments, manages children as regex patterns, builds combined regex from trie structure, assigns parameter index mappings, handles various path segment types.
+- Names noticed: Node class, Context interface, PATH_ERROR symbol, ParamAssocArray type, compareKey function, wildcard patterns, literal segments, label patterns, regex patterns, varIndex tracking, children management.
+- Simple note: Trie node implementing tree-based path organization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class that builds the Trie structure from path routes, manages regex substitution map, processes parameter placeholders with @ markers, creates final compiled regex with handler and param index mappings.
+- Names noticed: Trie class, Context, Node, ReplacementMap type, ParamAssocArray, PathError, insert method, buildRegExp method, mark substitution, groups, tokens with @\\n markers.
+- Simple note: Trie tree construction from routes with regex substitution.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export wrapper for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin export for module system.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: SmartRouter class implementing hybrid routing strategy, manages multiple router instances and route paths, automatically determines best router based on pattern matching, supports different strategies (regex patterns, trie structure, linear iteration), fallback mechanism when no single router can handle.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, RouterRoute, METHOD_NAME_ALL, routers array, routes array, activeRouter property, fallback matching.
+- Simple note: Hybrid router combining multiple strategies.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export wrapper for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin export for module system.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter class implementing tree-based path matching, uses Node class for trie structure, supports method-based routing, handles wildcards and path segments hierarchically, matches by traversing tree nodes.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL, checkOptionalParameter, add method, match method, tree traversal, wildcard handling.
+- Simple note: Tree-based router for hierarchical path matching.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class implementing trie structure for route matching, maintains children tree with path segments, stores methods and handlers at each node, handles pattern matching with regex, supports wildcards and dynamic parameters, implements search with tree traversal.
+- Names noticed: Node class, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, ParamAssocArray, Pattern type, getPattern function, splitPath function, splitRoutingPath function, METHOD_NAME_ALL, children, patterns, score tracking, search method, queue-based traversal.
+- Simple note: Tree node for hierarchical route matching.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Provides common test suite for all routers, runs test cases across different router implementations, handles skip logic for unsupported cases, validates handler matching, parameter extraction, and multi-match scenarios, used by all router test files.
+- Names noticed: runTest function, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, Router, match function, Params, ParamIndexMap, test suites with describe blocks, test cases for various routing scenarios.
+- Simple note: Common test runner for router comparisons.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Test suite for PatternRouter router, tests basic routing, parameter matching, wildcard handling, fallback behavior, specific to PatternRouter's regex-based approach, skip unsupported test cases.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Duplicate param name test, Trailing slash test, regex pattern matching.
+- Simple note: Unit tests for PatternRouter implementation.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Test suite for LinearRouter router, tests basic routing, trailing slash handling, star wildcard matching, multiple handler support, specific to LinearRouter's linear approach, skips unsupported patterns.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Multi match test, Trailing slash test, Skip part test, star wildcard matching.
+- Simple note: Unit tests for LinearRouter implementation.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Test suite for RegExpRouter router, tests routing with compiled regex support, validates static routes vs dynamic routes, handles wildcard patterns, tests for ambiguous path scenarios that throw errors, validates unsupported path error conditions, tests parameter index mapping and stash.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, ParamStash type, Return value type test, UnsupportedPathError tests, Ambiguous test, Duplicate param name tests, Static and dynamic tests, Different regular expression tests, Capture Group tests.
+- Simple note: Comprehensive unit tests for RegExpRouter implementation.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Minimal test suite for SmartRouter, wraps common tests using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as combined implementation, validates hybrid routing strategy, confirms SmartRouter delegates to sub-routers.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, constructor with routers array.
+- Simple note: Hybrid router test combining RegExp and Trie routers.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Brief test suite for TrieRouter, runs common test cases against TrieRouter implementation, validates tree-based matching, confirms all common cases pass.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, basic routing test, tree traversal validation.
+- Simple note: Unit tests for TrieRouter implementation.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Comprehensive unit test suite for TrieRouter's Node class, tests tree construction with various path patterns, validates insertion and search operations, tests multiple handler scenarios, tests wildcard handling, tests regex-based matching, tests duplicate parameter handling, tests tree sorting order, tests complex multi-match scenarios.
+- Names noticed: Node class, tree traversal test, search method test, multiple handlers test, wildcard matching test, regex matching test, duplicate param handling, sorting order test, complex path patterns, queue-based search implementation.
+- Simple note: Node class unit tests for TrieRouter tree operations.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: Pattern-based routing with compiled regex patterns, fast matching, supports optional parameters, throws on ambiguous patterns.
+- linear-router: Linear sequential matching with star and label support, simple iteration-based design.
+- reg-exp-router: Pre-compiled regex router with Trie organization, fast at matching time, supports middleware and prepared mode.
+- smart-router: Hybrid router that delegates to sub-routers, auto-optimizes based on registered routes.
+- trie-router: Tree-based matching implementation, handles all path types including regex.

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write
